params.credits: Number of ECTS credits associated with the subject
params.name: The official name of the course
params.professor: The address of the professor leading the course

params.subjectId: The ID of the subject to query

postGrade(address,address,uint256,uint8).details: Also updates the total ECTS credits for the student if the grade is passable (>= 5)

params.professor: The address of the professor giving the grade (verified by Core)
params.student: The address of the student receiving the grade
params.subjectId: The unique identifier of the subject

addSubject(string,uint8,address).notice: Registers a new subject into the gradebook

getSubjectMetadata(uint256).notice: Fetches details about a specific subject

postGrade(address,address,uint256,uint8).notice: Records a grade for a student in a specific subject
